original_question:
A community theater is holding auditions for a new play that has three different male roles, three different female roles, and four different roles that can be either gender. If seven men and eight women audition, in how many ways can the ten roles be assigned?

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}

similar_questions.question: A community theater is holding auditions for a new play that has four different male roles, four different female roles, and five different roles that can be either gender. If nine men and six women audition, in how many ways can the thirteen roles be assigned?

A community theater is holding auditions for a new play that has two different male roles, five different female roles, and six different roles that can be either gender. If six men and seven women audition, in how many ways can the thirteen roles be assigned?

A community theater is holding auditions for a new play that has three different male roles, four different female roles, and two different roles that can be either gender. If five men and three women audition, in how many ways can the nine roles be assigned?

A community theater is holding auditions for a new play that has six different male roles, one different female role, and three different roles that can be either gender. If ten men and six women audition, in how many ways can the ten roles be assigned?
